title: Aalto Foodsharing launches
description: Aalto Foodsharing officially starts, beginning regular food pickups in collaboration with local partners including K-Market and BakedByEli.

title: Sustainability Action Booster funds A!FS
description: Aalto's Sustainability Action Booster supports our initiative with a grant, enabling the quick scale to larger sustainability actions.

title: Cargo bike acquired
description: From now on, a cargo bike joins our food rescue operations, enabling larger food pickups and becoming a centerpiece at public events.

title: A!FS becomes Campus Sustainability Champion
description: Our initiative is recognized for its sustainability contribution on the campus.

title: Aalto Restaurant Committee outreach
description: Team members present Foodsharing to the Aalto Restaurant Committee, sparking interest and awareness of food rescue for campus student canteens.

title: Oulu Food Waste Festival
description: Three members represent A!FS at the Oulu Food Waste Festival organized by Dodo, gaining visibility among the Finnish foodsharing community and connecting with national actors.

title: Transition Town Network Finland
description: A!FS presents our volunteer coordination model and its integration with Karrot as a best-practice example at the national Transition Town Network gathering.

title: Food Conservation Workshop Series
description: A series of hands-on workshops covers pickling, lacto-fermentation, fruit leather, and bread pasta — connecting new people with food sustainability practices.

title: Food System Talk with Joel Tefke
description: A public talk on circular food systems, the first large public event organized by A!FS.

title: Orientation Week outreach
description: A!FS runs stands at Ota-Orienteering and Aalto Fest, reaching new students with flyers, patches, and the cargo bike.

title: Tipping Point sustainability conference
description: A!FS is represented at a critical sustainability roundtable in Helsinki, gaining further visibility in the city's sustainability network.

title: Community Christmas celebration
description: A Christmas cookout at the Design Factory brings partners and members together.

title: Dodo Urban Dinners
description: A!FS supplies dumpster-dived food for Dodo's Urban Dinner events. First steps towards seeding a potential Helsinki Hub?

title: Foodsharing Spring Cookout event
description: A public kick-off at the Design Factory recruits new food visionaries using a Cluedo-style game to explain roles and operations.

title: Membership in Nordic Climate Justice Coalition
description: A!FS becomes a member of the Nordic Climate Justice Coalition, a network for intersectional analyses of climate justice exposing Nordic countries’ climate injustice as a tactic to demanding just systemic transitions.

title: World Overshoot Day action — 376K reach
description: A joint action with Elokapina and Onni Tonkija at Helsinki railway station goes viral: 376K views (6% of Finland's population), 13.5K likes, 340 new followers, and 16 people indicate interest in joining the organizing team.

title: Challenge provider in Sustainability Hack-and-Debate event
description: Foodsharing provides a sustainability challenge, where students from Design and Engineering puzzel over the easter hackathon at Aalto University.

title: Cookout with Aalto Sustainability Club and Plant-Based University
description: In collaboration with two sustainability initiatives on campus, A!FS supports the first open cookout event of the year!

title: Foodsharing Helsinki takes shape
description: A new community fridge opens in collaboration with Dodo. Partners in Pasila are contacted, and an open strategy meetup is planned to integrate Foodsharing Helsinki and Aalto Foodsharing into a city-wide network.

title: Foodsharing at more campus fridges
description: There are now dedicated food-sharing sections in multiple fridges around the campus, where anyone can share leftover food. These include the Aalto Design Factory.
